hero.headline:
Your Backyard Story Starts
Right Here
hero.subheadline: From custom pools and outdoor kitchens to fire features and full landscape transformations, Outdoor Innovations brings architects, builders, and artisans together to create the backyard your family has always imagined. Serving Minnesota and Western Wisconsin for 19 years.

services.label: What We Create
services.headline: Complete Outdoor Living<br class="hidden md:block"> Designed Around Your Family
services.subtitle: Every project begins with how your family lives, relaxes, and celebrates. We design and build custom outdoor spaces that become the backdrop for your favorite memories.

cards.title: Custom In-Ground Pools
cards.description: Fully custom swimming pools designed for Minnesota and Western Wisconsin backyards. We handle every detail from concept through construction to create your personal oasis.

cards.title: Outdoor Kitchens & Bars
cards.description: Complete outdoor cooking and entertaining spaces with custom cabinetry, grills, countertops, and bar seating. Built for hosting and built to last through Midwest seasons.

cards.title: Pool Houses & Living Rooms
cards.description: Custom structures that complement your pool and landscape, providing changing areas, storage, and comfortable outdoor living spaces for year-round enjoyment.

cards.title: Fire & Water Features
cards.description: Custom fire pits, fireplaces, fountains, and water features that add warmth and ambiance. Extend your outdoor season and create gathering spots your family will love.

cards.title: Decks, Patios & Pergolas
cards.description: Premium hardscape and structure installations that seamlessly connect your home to the outdoors. Durable materials that stand up to harsh Midwest weather beautifully.

cards.title: Complete Landscape Design
cards.description: Full-service landscape architecture and installation including retaining walls, hardscaping, pavers, and plantings. One team from first sketch to final walkthrough.

how_it_works.headline: From Vision to Backyard in Three Steps

steps.title: Share Your Vision
steps.description: Tell us how your family lives outdoors. We'll visit your property, listen to your ideas, and provide a complimentary design consultation. No pressure, no obligations.

steps.title: We Design & Build It
steps.description: Our architects create detailed plans while our certified builders and artisans bring them to life. One integrated team manages every phase so nothing falls through the cracks.

steps.title: Make the Moments
steps.description: Your custom outdoor space is complete and ready for living. Host the cookouts, watch the sunsets, splash in the pool. These become tomorrow's favorite stories.

about.label: Why Families Choose Us
about.headline: Architects, Builders & Artisans — All Under One Roof
about.description: Founded in 2007 by Craig Palmer and Asher Judd, Outdoor Innovations has spent 19 years transforming backyards across Minnesota and Western Wisconsin into luxurious outdoor living spaces. Our integrated design-build model means your project flows seamlessly from concept to completion with one dedicated team who knows every detail.

features.title: Integrated Design-Build Team
features.description: Architects, builders, and artisans working together under one organization. No subcontractor confusion, no finger-pointing — just seamless execution.

features.title: Midwestern Climate Experts
features.description: Every material, design choice, and installation technique is selected specifically for Minnesota and Wisconsin conditions. Built to thrive in our four-season climate.

features.title: Your Vision, Our Craft
features.description: We don't do cookie-cutter. Every project is custom-designed around how your family actually lives, connects, and celebrates outdoors.

pricing.headline: Transparent Project Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project is custom, so we provide detailed proposals after your free design consultation. You'll know exactly what you're getting before we break ground.

guarantee.headline: Our "Moments Worth Remembering" Guarantee
guarantee.description: We stand behind every project we build. If any element of your outdoor space doesn't meet the standards we agreed upon, we'll make it right at no additional cost. Our reputation across Minnesota and Western Wisconsin is built on delivering exactly what we promise — and then some.

faqs.question: How long does a typical backyard project take?
faqs.answer: Project timelines vary based on scope. A patio or fire feature may take 2-3 weeks, while a full pool and outdoor living project typically runs 8-14 weeks. We provide a detailed timeline during the design phase and keep you updated at every milestone.

faqs.question: Do you handle the entire project from design to completion?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. That's our specialty. Our integrated design-build model means architects, builders, and artisans all work under one roof. You get one point of contact, one team, and a seamless experience from first consultation to final walkthrough.

faqs.question: Do you work in both Minnesota and Wisconsin?
faqs.answer: Yes. We serve the Minneapolis-St. Paul metro area and Western Wisconsin including Hudson, New Richmond, Stillwater, and surrounding communities. We've been building across both states for 19 years.

faqs.question: What happens if weather delays the project?
faqs.answer: We plan for Midwest weather from day one. Our project schedules include built-in buffer days, and we communicate proactively about any adjustments. We won't rush work in poor conditions — quality always comes first.

faqs.question: Can I see examples of your past work?
faqs.answer: Of course. We'll share our portfolio during your consultation, and you're welcome to visit completed projects with homeowner permission. With 19 years and hundreds of projects, we have examples for virtually every style and scope.

testimonials.name: Catherine J.
testimonials.text: Asher with Outdoor Innovations created an exceptional landscape design of the pool placement and subsequent hardscape that organically flowed with our home, deck, and yard. His teams thoughtfully, artistically, and precisely placed each piece with great care.

testimonials.name: Catherine R.
testimonials.text: We just finished a backyard pool project with Outdoor Innovations and it turned out absolutely beautiful! We highly recommend Craig and his crew. The process was smooth and efficient, and Craig's attention to detail made the whole experience wonderful.

testimonials.name: Barry W.
testimonials.text: I can't say enough about what a great experience this was. Asher helped us translate our vague idea into a vision and a plan. The project moved smoothly and on schedule, and all crew members were professional and friendly.

contact.headline:
Ready to Transform
Your Backyard?
contact.subtitle: Get a free design consultation and discover what's possible for your outdoor space. No pressure, no obligations — just honest ideas from a team that's been doing this for 19 years.
benefits: One integrated team from start to finish
